plan.failureSummary: The test runner crashed because of a network error ('TypeError: fetch failed') when communicating with the Donobu API server (specifically within FlowsPersistenceDonobuApi.setFlowMetadata). The application under test is healthy and was progressing through the checkout flow as expected.
observedIndicators: Test runner crashed during tool invocation metadata reporting
Web app under test responded correctly as seen in the failure screenshot

remediationSteps.summary: Verify connection stability to the Donobu API endpoint.
remediationSteps.details: Investigate runner outbound connectivity or Donobu API server uptime. A 'fetch failed' typically indicates a transient network partition or a service outage on the receiving endpoint.
Since this is a network/dependency-level flake external to the test code and application, retrying the run is expected to pass if the API is available.

plan.notes: This is an infrastructure or external dependency failure rather than an application defect. The failure screenshot confirms the web app was working fine and was already on the 'Checkout: Your Information' page.
